meta.name: copilot-sdk-nodejs
meta.title: Copilot Sdk Nodejs Skill
meta.description: This file provides guidance on building Node.js/TypeScript applications using GitHub Copilot SDK. Triggers on: **.ts, **.js, package.json

original_definition.skill_description: This file provides guidance on building Node.js/TypeScript applications using GitHub Copilot SDK. Triggers on: **.ts, **.js, package.json

actions.name: `cliUrl` - URL of existing CLI server (e.g., "localhost:8080
actions.description: `cliUrl` - URL of existing CLI server (e.g., "localhost:8080"). When provided, client won't spawn a process

actions.description: `cwd` - Working directory for the CLI process (default: process.cwd())

actions.description: `env` - Environment variables for the CLI process (default: process.env)
